visualDirection: No prominent founder portrait above the fold
Split-path homepage that routes visitors immediately

homepage.headline: Don't get left behind in the AI era.
homepage.subhead: Whether you know exactly what you need or you're still figuring out where the opportunities are, Mozingo Systems has a clear path forward.

aiProducts.summary: Predefined AI products for narrow jobs. They answer, capture, or book without turning the whole business into a software project.

operationsImprovement.summary: Start with an operations audit, then decide what to plan, implement, and maintain so the business runs with less friction.

about.headline: Frank Mozingo builds practical systems that reduce friction.
about.summary: Operations leadership, data systems, automation, software, and practical AI.

contact.prompt: Tell me whether you need AI Products or Operations Improvement. I will reply with the most practical first step.
